title: The sanitation paradox and groundwater vulnerability in the spatial distribution of hepatitis A virus foodborne disease in South Korea, 2020-2024 (analysis code)
description: Reproducible R/INLA code for a Bayesian spatiotemporal (NB + BYM + RW1 + Type I space-time) analysis of district-level hepatitis A virus incidence across 223 South Korean districts, 2020-2024. Reproduces the principal model, model comparison, eight-graph neighbourhood sensitivity, BYM2 prior sensitivity, Moran's I, Getis-Ord Gi*, and alternative-specification robustness checks reported in the manuscript.

creators.name: Kim, Seongdae
creators.affiliation: Hongik University; Korea University Graduate School, Seoul, Republic of Korea
